summary: Validate JSONB dict fields before persisting with a coarse `json.dumps()` probe (`_validate_jsonb_dict` in `alert_service.py`) — catches `datetime`, `Decimal`, callables at write time rather than serialization time. Prefer this over per-scanner-type Pydantic schemas when the key set varies by scanner type; use a concrete Pydantic model with `extra="forbid"` only when the shape is fixed (e.g. `ChannelConfig` in `schemas/alerts.py`).
